Funding Rate Harvester — Carry Scan

Delta-neutral funding harvest: short a Hyperliquid perp, hedge with a yield-bearing spot leg, keep the stacked carry.
snapshot
Triple carry stack. Each candidate stacks funding (the short collects it), spot-leg yield (the long hedge itself earns — Pendle PT, weETH, sUSDe, or zero-yield HL spot), and an optional Boros fixed-rate lock, minus fees and slippage. Ranked by net APR after costs.
Asset Spot leg Net APR Funding + Spot yield − Fees − Slippage Open interest Funding EMA
